example: Innovation drives economic growth.
mnemonic: in(안에) + nov(새로운) + ation. 안에서 새로운 것을 만들면 혁신!

example: The building was inspected for safety.
For instance, let me give you an example.
mnemonic: in(안에) + stance(서다). 안에 서 있는 사례!

example: He works at a research institute.
mnemonic: in(안에) + stitute(세우다). 안에 세우면 기관 설립!

example: The heat was intense.
How do you interpret this poem?
mnemonic: inter(사이에) + pret(가격). 사이에서 값을 매기면 해석!

example: Don't interrupt when someone is talking.
The police investigated the crime.
She invested money in stocks.
mnemonic: in(안에) + vest(옷). 안에 옷 입히듯 돈을 넣으면 투자!

example: The village was isolated by the flood.
They launched a new product.
New legislation was passed.
She has liberal views on education.
A sports car is a luxury.
The majority of students passed the test.
This company manufactures electronics.
The mechanism of the clock is complex.
Only a minority disagreed.
We need to modify the plan.
Teachers monitor student progress.
It was a moral decision.
They negotiated a peace treaty.
mnemonic: neg(아닌) + oti(여가). 쉴 틈 없이 논의하면 협상!

example: It was raining; nevertheless, we went out.
mnemonic: never + the + less. 그래도 덜하지 않게!

example: I have no notion of what you mean.
mnemonic: not(알다) + ion. 알게 된 것이 개념!

example: There are numerous reasons to exercise.
